title: [Sylinar's Spire, Fifth Floor]
description: At rest, a dusty suit of platemail stands balanced against the greatsword it holds point-down before it, its surface kept clean and free of dust.  Across from the armor, a faint chill lingers around an open door, cool air slipping quietly into the space.  Nearby, a spiraling stone staircase winds both upward and downward, continuing toward the sixth level while fading into shadow below.
